# Cool Paper

arXiv:2501.12345v1

## Abstract

We propose a new method for protein structure alignment with
improved accuracy on the BPTI suite.

## Results

Our method achieves median RMSD less than 0.5 angstrom across
the 1000-structure BPTI test suite, beating the prior approach
by a substantial margin in absolute terms.

## References

1. Smith, J. and Jones, K. (2024). A great algorithm.
   https://doi.org/10.1234/abc.2024.012
2. Doe, A. (2023). The earlier paper.
